author: guitargeek
body:
#### PR description:

Migrate PhysicsTools/PatAlgos plugins to ESGetToken, as already tried in https://github.com/cms-sw/cmssw/pull/34307 but then decided to have it in a separate PR.

#### PR validation:

CMSSW compiles.

#### if this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR:

No backport intended.
title: Migrate PhysicsTools/PatAlgos plugins to ESGetToken
